subject: The Mozi Money Minute: Middle Pricing
body:
Perspective: When I was 20 I wanted to be a millionaire...Now that I'm a millionaire, I want to be 20."

It makes me realize that when I'm 40, I'd rather be 34 (my age) with nothing, just to be 34 (again).

A different frame of gratitude I thought I'd share.

Mozi Money Minute: Middle Pricing. If you sell a cheap thing and an expensive thing, and you want more people to take your most expensive thing, add a mid-tier third option.

Put it exactly in between your cheap and your expensive thing from a features perspective.

But, then price it only 10% cheaper than your most expensive option. This will skew more people to see the more expensive thing you sell as a deal.

If you even get 10% more people to take your more expensive thing, this email did its job.

Deploy & enjoy.

Alex Hormozi
